caption: A man is seated in a room that appears to be a studio or retail space, featuring framed photos on the wall and a clothing rack with a white mannequin in the background. He wears a green baseball cap, headphones, and a green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK". A professional microphone is positioned in front of him. In the first frame, he is speaking. By the second frame, he has raised a red cup to his lips to take a drink. In the third frame, he continues drinking from the red cup. By the final frame, he has lowered the cup and is looking toward the side. Throughout the clip, two logos are visible on screen: a circular emblem on the left and red text on the right that reads "HELLY TOT".
